name: 8/8/88 Needle AL
short_description: On the ominous date of 8/8/1888, the entire population of Needle, Alabama seemingly vanished, leaving behind only a haunting silence and an eerie sense of dread. A first-person psychological-horror drama.
detailed_description:
Old Godfrey returns from his morning walk to find the town eerily deserted. Where did the townsfolk vanish to? And what could have caused such a devastating outcome? Unravel the twisted mystery and uncover the heart-wrenching tragedy that befell this cursed town.

Immerse yourself in the stunningly realistic 3D photography of 8/8/88 Needle AL, a game that seamlessly blends the visual-novel and point-and-click adventure genres to create a dark gaming experience unlike any other. With a bone-chilling storyline about a cult, corruption, and racism in the post Civil War south, this game is a must-play for horror fans who loved our previous title "Wardwell House".
